title: Missing role authorization check on privileged operation
source_title: DAML Authorization Pattern - Role-Based Access Control
description: A privileged operation (BurnFrom) is missing a role membership check. Any party authorized as controller can burn tokens from any account without holding the BURNER_ROLE. This is the most fundamental DAML authorization anti-pattern.
recommendation: Always verify role membership (Set.member caller roleSet) before executing privileged operations.

oracle.description: Privileged choices must validate caller role membership before execution.
oracle.static_signal: Choice body lacks assertMsg/assertRole on role set membership for controller
oracle.symbolic_property: forall caller. executes(BurnFrom, caller) => member(caller, roles.burners)

notes: Synthetic example distilled from common patterns seen in DAML audits.
